data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for suggesting alternatives.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that the system can suggest alternatives effectively. However, the evidence provided does not include concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where alternatives are suggested, there is no definitive evidence demonstrating that this requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system suggests alternatives based on participant feedback.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the suggestion of alternatives.
